description: The default `/` prefix entry point. Generates a command plan, runs the safety pipeline, displays the plan and risk via FxConsole, asks for confirmation per the gate decision, then executes (or refuses).
notes: Keep this function thin — orchestration only. All logic lives in the modules it calls.
steps: TDD: Mode `'/'` flows through context → plan → safety → gate.
TDD: `read-only` class produces `ask` gate; on `y` confirmation, executes.
TDD: `risky-write` class produces `ask-with-warning`; on `EXECUTE` token, executes.
TDD: Transcript written for every attempt regardless of outcome.
Tests mock context, model, safety, gate, exec, transcript.
name: [ux-02] Invoke-SlashOps (/) — generate, scan, ask
